posts.text:
I wonder if she'd say the same things today (she probably would)

Video

The MAGA mindset: If Trump succeeds it’s genius, if he fails it’s sabotage.

Video

Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

I know the entire internet has explained this to you, but Omidyar Network is not a dark money group. The funding is public and my non partisan journalism fellowship was disclosed. Chorus DID work w a dark money group (1630 fund) to run an UNDISCLOSED dark money influence scheme



— https://nitter.net/TaylorLorenz/status/2032854170605076568#m
This tweet had like 20 likes before Hasan hopped onto it lol

Notice how these disgusting cretins speak about soldier deaths as passive and inevitable when Trump is in office? You will never see strong condemnations of his actions or blame assigned to him when soldiers die under his thoughtless watch.


Nick Sortor (@nicksortor)

🚨 JUST IN: One of the American airmen who lost his life in the KC-135 crash in Iraq has been identified as Maj. Alex Klinner

Klinner leaves behind a wife, a 2-year-old, and 7 month old twins

Absolutely heartbreaking. Pray for th

To this day, no one was ever able to point out any disagreement where Finkelstein was correct over me in that debate. The largest confrontation we had over the plausibility test for the genocide claim was something I ended up being completely vindicated on as well.

The debate went so horrible that Finkelstein even spent time later on Brianna’s show laughing about how he was never going to show up and take the conversation seriously anyway.


Briahna Joy Gray (@briebriejoy)

This is a “Mr. Borel

>is silent while Trump calls for the execution of sitting members of Congress

“how did we get here???”

You are a disgusting, empty creature.


Dan Bongino (@dbongino)

Yesterday’s show was a wake up call. The video of the young man so casually discussing a plot to brutally murder another conservative commentator during a debate, was troubling to watch. I’m having a really hard time processing how we got here. 

Yes, we live in a peerless country, full of kind-hearted and giving people. But

Did he change his camera so we wouldn’t notice he got rid of Kaya? Is she not worth keeping around if he can’t shock her into staying as a prop the whole stream? 😭


usurp tha chef (@usurpthachef)

Hasan attempts to defend his “America bad” ideology. 

This is why no mainstream member of the Democratic Party should work with this man

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/usurpthachef/status/2032794430860652617#m

Humans don’t stop doing tribalism when everyone looks the same, they just zoom in harder.
